About Us

About BME Recruitment

BME Recruitment was founded with one clear objective: to provide reliable, high-quality labour to the commercial and industrial construction sectors across the UK.

Since day one, we've built our reputation on honesty, professionalism, and delivering skilled operatives that our clients can depend on. We work with some of the UK's most respected electrical, mechanical, and M&E contractors, supporting projects of all sizes, from local developments to large-scale commercial and industrial installations.

Over the years, we've developed an extensive database of tried, tested, and reliable operatives, allowing us to respond quickly to our clients' labour requirements while maintaining the high standards they're accustomed to.

Today, BME Recruitment proudly supports projects throughout the UK and continues to build lasting partnerships with contractors by delivering quality people, exceptional service, and a commitment to helping projects succeed.

Honesty

We've built our reputation on honesty and professionalism. What we promise is what we deliver.

Quality

Skilled operatives our clients can depend on, vetted and matched to the right projects.

Partnership

Long-term relationships with M&E contractors, not one-off placements.

What We Do

Skilled Trades We Supply

We supply a wide range of skilled trades to commercial and industrial construction projects across the UK.

Electricians

Qualified electricians for commercial and industrial installations, from first fix to final fix.

Electrical Improvers

Experienced improvers to support electrical teams on larger projects.

Electricians' Mates

Reliable mates to assist qualified electricians and keep projects moving.

Plumbers

Skilled plumbers for commercial and industrial heating, sanitation, and pipework systems.

Pipefitters

Experienced pipefitters for industrial pipework, fabrication, and installation.

Mechanical Labour

General and specialist mechanical labour to support plant rooms, HVAC, and building services.

Skilled Trades & Support

Additional support operatives and skilled trades to keep sites fully staffed.

For Clients

Need Skilled Labour?

We provide responsive, dependable M&E labour supply to contractors across the UK.

  • Rapid response to your labour requirements
  • Vetted, qualified, and reference-checked operatives
  • Flexible numbers — single operative to full project team
  • UK-wide coverage from our Leeds base
Request Operatives
For Candidates

Looking for Work?

Register with BME Recruitment and get access to ongoing work opportunities on commercial and industrial projects across the UK. We work with some of the country's most respected M&E contractors — upload your CV below and we'll be in touch.

Prefer to speak to us first? Call 0113 733 6301 or email matthew@bme-recruitment.com.

Why BME?

Why Choose BME Recruitment?

We focus exclusively on mechanical and electrical construction recruitment, giving us the industry knowledge needed to match the right people to the right projects.

M&E Specialists

We focus exclusively on mechanical and electrical construction, not general recruitment.

Responsive

We respond quickly to your labour requirements because we know construction doesn't wait.

Vetted Operatives

Every worker in our database has been tried, tested, and verified.

Quality People

We supply skilled, reliable tradespeople who can hit the ground running.

Flexible

From a single operative to an entire project team, we scale to your needs.

UK-Wide

We support projects throughout the UK from our Leeds base.

Get In Touch

Request Operatives

Tell us about your project and the labour you need. We'll respond quickly with vetted, available operatives.
